content:
50/30/20 Budget Spreadsheet Price: $4.99
The simplest budgeting method, automated. This spreadsheet applies the 50/30/20 rule to your income automatically.
Features Automatic Allocation — Enter your income and see your ideal spending limits instantly 50% Needs — Housing, utilities, groceries, insurance 30% Wants — Entertainment, dining out, subscriptions 20% Savings — Emergency fund, investments, debt payoff Progress Tracking — Visual indicators show if you’re on track Who Is This For? This template is perfect for:
Beginners who want a proven budgeting framework People overwhelmed by complex budget systems Anyone who wants clear spending guardrails Those saving for specific financial goals Frequently Asked Questions Q: What is the 50/30/20 rule? A: It’s a simple budgeting framework: 50% of income goes to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings or debt payoff. This template automates the math.
Q: Can I adjust the percentages? A: Yes. While the template defaults to 50/30/20, you can customize the percentages to fit your situation.
Q: Does this work with irregular income? A: Yes. Enter your actual income each month and the template recalculates your budget limits automatically.
Q: What’s included in the download? A: You get both an Excel (.xlsx) file and instructions for using it in Google Sheets.
Buy on Etsy →

content:
Debt Payoff Calculator Price: $6.99
See exactly when you’ll be debt-free. Compare payoff strategies and find the fastest path out of debt.
Features Snowball & Avalanche Methods — Compare both strategies side-by-side Payoff Timeline — See your debt-free date based on current payments Interest Savings — Calculate how much you save with extra payments Payment Schedule — Month-by-month breakdown of every payment Multiple Debts — Track credit cards, student loans, car loans, and more Who Is This For? This template is perfect for:
Anyone with multiple debts who wants a clear payoff plan People deciding between snowball vs. avalanche methods Those who want to see how extra payments accelerate payoff Couples working together to eliminate debt Frequently Asked Questions Q: What’s the difference between snowball and avalanche? A: Snowball pays smallest debts first for quick wins. Avalanche pays highest interest first to minimize total interest. This template shows both so you can choose.
Q: How many debts can I track? A: The template supports up to 15 different debts with individual balances, interest rates, and minimum payments.
Q: Can I see how extra payments help? A: Yes. Enter different extra payment amounts and instantly see how your payoff date and total interest change.
Q: Does it work for student loans? A: Yes. The calculator works for any type of debt: credit cards, student loans, car loans, personal loans, medical debt, or mortgages.
Buy on Etsy →

Track every business expense and maximize your tax deductions. Built specifically for freelancers and self-employed professionals.
Features Tax-Ready Categories — Expenses organized by IRS Schedule C categories Receipt Logging — Track receipt numbers and storage locations Mileage Tracker — Log business miles with automatic deduction calculation Monthly Summaries — See your business expenses month-over-month Annual Totals — Export-ready totals for tax preparation Who Is This For? This template is perfect for:
Freelancers and independent contractors Self-employed professionals Side hustlers with business expenses Anyone who files Schedule C taxes Frequently Asked Questions Q: Does this replace accounting software? A: For simple freelance businesses, yes. It tracks income, expenses, and generates the totals you need for taxes. For complex businesses with inventory or employees, you may need dedicated software.
Q: What expense categories are included? A: Categories align with IRS Schedule C: advertising, car expenses, contract labor, office expenses, supplies, travel, and more.
Q: Can I track multiple clients? A: Yes. You can tag expenses by client or project to see profitability by engagement.
Q: Does it calculate quarterly estimated taxes? A: The template tracks income and expenses. You can use the totals to estimate quarterly payments, though it doesn’t calculate tax rates.

content:
Investment Portfolio Tracker Price: $6.99
Track your entire investment portfolio in one spreadsheet. See performance, allocation, and gains at a glance.
Features All Investments in One Place — Stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, crypto, bonds Performance Tracking — Track gains/losses by holding and overall Asset Allocation — Visual breakdown of your portfolio by asset class Cost Basis Tracking — Record purchase prices for accurate gain calculations Dividend Tracking — Log dividend payments and calculate yield Who Is This For? This template is perfect for:
Self-directed investors managing their own portfolio People with investments across multiple brokerages Anyone who wants a clearer picture of their total investments Investors who want to track allocation and rebalancing needs Frequently Asked Questions Q: Does it update stock prices automatically? A: In Google Sheets, you can use the GOOGLEFINANCE function for automatic price updates. In Excel, you can manually update prices or use data connections.
Q: Can I track crypto investments? A: Yes. Add any asset type including cryptocurrencies. You’ll need to manually update crypto prices.
Q: Does it calculate capital gains for taxes? A: The template tracks cost basis and current value, showing unrealized gains. For tax lot tracking and specific identification, you may need your brokerage’s records.
Q: Can I track multiple accounts? A: Yes. Tag each holding by account (401k, IRA, brokerage) and see allocation across all accounts combined.

content:
Net Worth Tracker Price: $6.99
Know your true financial position. Track assets, subtract liabilities, and watch your net worth grow over time.
Features Complete Asset Tracking — Cash, investments, property, vehicles, valuables Liability Tracking — Mortgages, loans, credit cards, other debts Monthly Snapshots — Record net worth each month to see trends Historical Charts — Visualize your net worth growth over time Category Breakdown — See what percentage of your worth is in each asset type Who Is This For? This template is perfect for:
Anyone who wants a clear picture of their overall finances People working toward specific net worth milestones Those tracking progress toward financial independence Couples who want to combine and track household net worth Frequently Asked Questions Q: How often should I update my net worth? A: Monthly is ideal for most people. Update balances on the same day each month (like the 1st) for consistent tracking.
Q: What counts as an asset? A: Anything of value you own: bank accounts, investments, retirement accounts, home equity, vehicles, valuable personal property.
Q: Should I include my home’s value? A: Yes, but be conservative. Use recent comparable sales or a conservative estimate, not Zillow’s high estimate. Subtract your mortgage in liabilities.
Q: How do I track joint finances with a partner? A: Add all shared assets and debts to get household net worth. You can also maintain separate columns if you want to track individual contributions.
Buy on Etsy →

Privacy Policy Last updated: March 9, 2026
FinanceCraftedSheets (“we,” “us,” or “our”) respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share personal data when you visit our website or purchase our digital products.
Data We Collect Analytics data: We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4 ID: G-3CJWBTD1SG) to collect usage data such as pages viewed, device/browser information, and approximate location (city/region). Cookies: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences and to measure site performance. Etsy purchase data: If you purchase through our Etsy shop, we receive order details such as name, email address, billing/shipping information (if applicable), product purchased, and transaction details. Contact data: If you email us, we collect your email address and the content of your message. Legal Bases for Processing (GDPR) We process personal data under these legal bases:
Consent: For analytics cookies where required and when you opt in. Legitimate interests: To improve our website, understand product performance, and prevent fraud. Contract: To fulfill digital product purchases and provide customer support. Legal obligation: To comply with applicable laws and accounting requirements. How We Use Your Data Provide and deliver digital products. Respond to customer service requests. Improve site performance and user experience. Analyze traffic and product interest. Comply with legal and tax obligations. Sharing of Data We share data with:
Google Analytics for website analytics. Etsy for processing purchases and delivering digital files. Service providers that help us operate the website (e.g., hosting). We do not sell your personal data.
International Transfers Your data may be processed outside your country (including the United States). Where required, we use appropriate safeguards for international transfers.
Data Retention We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described above and to comply with legal obligations.
Your Rights (GDPR) If you are in the EEA/UK, you have the right to:
Access your data Correct inaccurate data Request deletion (right to be forgotten) Restrict or object to processing Data portability Withdraw consent at any time (where consent is the legal basis) To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.
Cookies You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect site functionality. For analytics, you may also use browser tools to opt out of tracking.
Children’s Privacy Our products and services are not intended for children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect data from children.
Changes to This Policy We may update this policy from time to time. We will update the “Last updated” date when changes are made.
Contact FinanceCraftedSheets
Email: bobvillarreal97@gmail.com

People saving for multiple goals (vacation, emergency fund, car) Visual learners who need to see progress Anyone who struggles to stay motivated while saving Couples tracking shared savings goals Frequently Asked Questions Q: How many goals can I track? A: The template supports up to 10 simultaneous savings goals. Each goal has its own progress tracker and contribution log.
Q: Can I track goals without deadlines? A: Yes. Target dates are optional. You can track open-ended savings goals without a specific deadline.
Q: Does it calculate how much I need to save monthly? A: Yes. Enter your goal amount and target date, and the template calculates your required monthly contribution automatically.
Q: Can I use this for a sinking fund? A: Absolutely. Many customers use this template to manage sinking funds for annual expenses, holidays, and irregular bills.

Anyone who’s lost track of their subscriptions People trying to cut monthly expenses Those who’ve been surprised by forgotten recurring charges Households combining multiple people’s subscriptions Frequently Asked Questions Q: What counts as a subscription? A: Any recurring charge: streaming services, software, gym memberships, subscription boxes, cloud storage, news sites, apps with monthly fees.
Q: Can I track annual subscriptions? A: Yes. Enter the billing frequency (monthly, quarterly, annual) and the template calculates your true monthly cost.
Q: How do I find subscriptions I forgot about? A: Check your bank and credit card statements for the last 12 months. Look for recurring charges and add them to the tracker.
Q: Does this send renewal reminders? A: The template shows upcoming renewal dates. You can sort by date to see what’s renewing soon, but it doesn’t send automated reminders.

Common Questions Having trouble downloading? Check your Etsy purchases page. Downloads are available immediately after purchase. If you don’t see it, check your spam folder for the Etsy confirmation email.
Need a different file format? All templates work in both Excel (.xlsx) and Google Sheets. Upload the Excel file to Google Drive to use in Sheets.
Want a custom template? We occasionally take custom requests. Email us with details about what you need.

Common Questions

Having trouble downloading? Check your Etsy purchases page. Downloads are available immediately after purchase. If you don’t see it, check your spam folder for the Etsy confirmation email.

Need a different file format? All templates work in both Excel (.xlsx) and Google Sheets. Upload the Excel file to Google Drive to use in Sheets.
